steps.title: Spot the key emotional signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the phrase “only becoming more pleased with her work every hour instead of tiring of it,” which directly shows that Mary's satisfaction is growing, not declining.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: The matching choice states the main idea: Mary feels very satisfied when taking care of the garden. The other three either contradict the passage (B), invent unsupported motivations (A), or shift focus from her feelings (C). D is correct.
